message.content:
Apply NinjaPromo design system to these remaining pages. READ each file first, then EDIT them.

NinjaPromo design CSS classes (in index.html):
- `.ninja-card` — bg-#111111, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rounded-1rem
- `.gradient-text` — gradient text indigo→purple→pink
- `.btn-gradient` — pill gradient button, rounded-full
- `.gradient-border` — gradient border card

Design patterns:
- Cards: `ninja-card` (replaces bg-[#0c0815], glass-panel, old card patterns)
- Buttons: rounded-full, primary=`btn-gradient`, secondary=`border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full`
- Typography: bold sans headings, `gradient-text` accents
- Borders: border-white/[0.06] or border-white/[0.08]
- Text: white headings, gray-500 body, purple-400 accents
- Inputs: bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl

Files to update (READ then EDIT each one):

1. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\ContentWriter.tsx` — cards: ninja-card, buttons: btn-gradient pill
2. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Reputation.tsx` — cards: ninja-card, buttons: pill
3. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\BotTracking.tsx` — cards: ninja-card, buttons: pill
4. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\ActionPlan.tsx` — cards: ninja-card, buttons: pill
5. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Projects.tsx` — project cards: ninja-card, buttons: pill
6. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Directory.tsx` — listing cards: ninja-card, buttons: pill
7. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\DirectoryListing.tsx` — detail view: ninja-card, buttons: pill
8. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\DirectorySubmit.tsx` — form: ninja-card, inputs, btn-gradient

Preserve ALL functionality. Only change styling classes, not logic.

content.text:
Now I have all the files read. There are only 7 files to update (DirectoryListing and DirectorySubmit don't exist -- the actual file is DirectoryEntity.tsx). Let me now apply the NinjaPromo design system to all files. I'll work through them systematically.

Let me start with all the edits. The main patterns to replace:
- `bg-[#0c0815]` -> `ninja-card` class (but since these are Tailwind classes in className, I'll use the ninja-card pattern: `bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-[1rem]`)
- `border border-purple-500/10` -> `border border-white/[0.08]`
- `glass-panel` -> `ninja-card`
- Buttons with gradients -> `btn-gradient` + `rounded-full`
- Secondary buttons -> `border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full`
- Input fields -> `bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl`
- `bg-black/40 border border-white/10` in inputs -> `bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08]`

Let me apply the edits to all files now.

**File 1: ContentWriter.tsx**
